commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh And the LORD has done to you, as he spoke by me: for the LORD has torn the kingdom out of your hand, and given it to your neighbor, even to David: To thee. Hebrew, "to him. "This was only a repetition of what Samuel had before denounced, chap. If the evil spirit spoke this, he was not guilty of falsehood, no more than Matthew viii. (Calmet) But would he dare so often to repeat the name of the Lord. (Haydock) Could he know what would happen to Saul, the next day. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
